# PicsiDrop - Peer-to-Peer Same-Day Parcel Delivery

PicsiDrop is a secure, pocket-friendly peer-to-peer delivery platform developed by Paverasa Private Limited. It connects shippers with everyday travelers to deliver parcels on the same day, up to 70% cheaper than traditional courier companies.

## Core Value Proposition

- **Same-Day Delivery**: Directly utilizes travelers heading along matching routes for instant delivery.
- **70% Cheaper**: Peer-to-peer logistics significantly reduces overhead, offering pocket-friendly prices.
- **KYC & Verification**: Every traveler undergoes secure Aadhaar KYC identity verification.
- **Escrow-Protected**: Payments and parcel security are safeguarded by robust escrow terms.
- **WhatsApp Support & Tracking**: Instant tracking and live communication via integrated WhatsApp channels.

---

## Operating Entity

**Paverasa Private Limited**
- **Headquarters**: 173, PLASSEY LANE, Bowenpally, Tirumalagiri, Hyderabad - 500011, Telangana, India.
- **Primary Support Line**: +91 81254 32177
- **Inquiry Emails**: paverasa4@gmail.com, paverasapvtltd@gmail.com
- **LinkedIn Profile**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/paverasa-private-limited/

---

## Site Map & Public Pages

The site is built with Next.js 16 (App Router) and Tailwind CSS. The public entry points are:

- **Homepage (`/`)**: Core value proposition, hero presentation, dynamic features, FAQ accordions, and custom parallax animations.
- **About (`/about`)**: Story of PicsiDrop, team background, green energy-friendly logistics, and same-day delivery philosophy.
- **Contact (`/contact`)**: Support details, map coordination, headquarters listings, and dynamic SMTP-connected contact form.
- **Privacy Policy (`/privacy`)**: Privacy statements, data encryption, KYC verification security, and cookies policy.
- **Terms of Service (`/terms`)**: Escrow payment terms, traveler responsibilities, shipper policies, and dispute resolution guidelines.

---

## Architecture & API Reference

- **SMTP Email Api Endpoint (`POST /api/contact`)**:
  - Accepts JSON: `{ name: string, email: string, phone?: string, subject: string, message: string }`
  - Relays verified requests securely to official emails (`paverasa4@gmail.com`, `paverasapvtltd@gmail.com`) using Nodemailer SMTP transporter.
  - Safe local variable handling using `SMTP_HOST`, `SMTP_PORT`, `SMTP_USER`, `SMTP_PASSWORD` and `CONTACT_RECEIVER_EMAIL`.
